title: Bitter Silky Romantic German Ginger Stir-fry
description: A warm and soothing dish featuring a blend of bitter flavors with a silky texture, ideal for a romantic evening meal.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons ginger puree
ingredients.notes: Ensure it's well-chilled to avoid burning while cooking

ingredients.name: 1 cup chicken broth
ingredients.notes: Use deglazed pan juices for a deeper flavor

instructions: Heat the pan with raw broccoli in it over medium-high heat.
Add ginger puree and stir until fragrant, about a minute.
Deglaze the pan with chicken broth, stirring continuously to prevent burning.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for another 5 minutes or until the sauce has slightly thickened.
Stir in vinegar and continue cooking for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Remove from heat and serve hot.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
